name: Potential Log4Shell Activity
notes:
This rule triggers when potential Remote Code Execution related to Log4Shell Exploit (CVE-2021-44228) is observed. This could indicate an attacker bypassing it via techniques such as system environment variables, lower or upper lookup, invalid unicode characters with upper, system properties, html url encoding and notations.

The custom function LOG4J::DETECTED, accepts both string and integer values and returns true if they contain log4j strings.

Note: To view the events that would trigger this rule, use the search "Potential Log4Shell Detected".
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Apache HTTP Server, Amazon AWS WAF, Microsoft IIS, NGINX HTTP Server, Amazon AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service, F5 Networks BIG-IP AFM

when the event matches ("URL" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Query String" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Query String", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Path" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Path", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Host" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Host", 40) == TRUE) OR ("User Agent" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("User Agent", 40) == TRUE) OR ("Request URI" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("Request URI", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Referrer" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Referrer", 40) == TRUE) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Log4Shell Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Apache HTTP Server, Amazon AWS WAF, Microsoft IIS, NGINX HTTP Server, Amazon AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service, F5 Networks BIG-IP AFM

AND when the event matches ("URL" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Query String" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Query String", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Path" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Path", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Host" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Host", 40) == TRUE) OR ("User Agent" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("User Agent", 40) == TRUE) OR ("Request URI" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("Request URI", 40) == TRUE) OR ("URL Referrer" IS NOT NULL AND LOG4J::DETECTED("URL Referrer", 40) == TRUE) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects when potential Remote Code Execution related to Log4Shell Exploit (CVE-2021-44228) is observed. This could indicate an attacker bypassing it via techniques such as system environment variables, lower or upper lookup, invalid unicode characters with upper, system properties, html url encoding and notations.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
